data.name: The Singer
data.detailed_description:
Ria is a young and beautiful girl with dreams of the future.
She has an undiscovered body. Ria sings beautifully and waits for someone to discover her.
And, who are you? You are Ria's boyfriend.
Ria will soon become a famous singer and her life will become more marginal. Can you keep up with that?

Main Characters;



Ria
Our main character and the one you'll see all the time in the game.



MC
Ria's boyfriend. You decide his name. His choices will seriously affect Ria's behavior.



Carl
A manager with a successful career. You can characterize him as a villain in the game.



Lily
Ria's best friend. She's a pain in the ass!

Side Characters;



Angel
World famous singer. She has a big role in the story. And she's very hot.



Daniel
The one you'll see in many scenes with Ria.



Gina
MC's close friend. He was very close with Gina before MC met Ria.



Lizzy
Lizzy is the hot milf in the game. You'll see her in many scenes.

And many more characters...
This amazing story about the career of a young singer is waiting for you.

data.short_description: Get ready to take control of Ria's life! In this Erotic Visual Novel for Adults, you will decide the future of this promising singer. Her boyfriend's choices will make her a faithful lover or corrupt her.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or Superior
  • 處理器: 2.0GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X or Superior
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon, Intel
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo (64 bit)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
